## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in to review RAMP's content performance and discuss strategy adjustments.](https://fathom.video/share/XAEFkPMptVVtL83VwgCNbgs4okka4taY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sessions and impressions improved, particularly in AI overviews (2,563 appearances for expense categories)](https://fathom.video/share/XAEFkPMptVVtL83VwgCNbgs4okka4taY?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Content format (direct answers, charts) well-suited for AI citations](https://fathom.video/share/XAEFkPMptVVtL83VwgCNbgs4okka4taY?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Potential opportunity to expand vendor overview page content](https://fathom.video/share/XAEFkPMptVVtL83VwgCNbgs4okka4taY?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Looker report unavailable; full data analysis pending](https://fathom.video/share/XAEFkPMptVVtL83VwgCNbgs4okka4taY?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Overview

  - [Sessions slightly improved compared to last week](https://fathom.video/share/XAEFkPMptVVtL83VwgCNbgs4okka4taY?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Impressions grew, especially in AI overviews](https://fathom.video/share/XAEFkPMptVVtL83VwgCNbgs4okka4taY?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [No major changes in page rankings](https://fathom.video/share/XAEFkPMptVVtL83VwgCNbgs4okka4taY?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [Nearly all pages saw slight increases in clicks](https://fathom.video/share/XAEFkPMptVVtL83VwgCNbgs4okka4taY?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Overall performance stable, with overview content particularly strong](https://fathom.video/share/XAEFkPMptVVtL83VwgCNbgs4okka4taY?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Expense categories appeared 2,563 times in AI overviews](https://fathom.video/share/XAEFkPMptVVtL83VwgCNbgs4okka4taY?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)

### AI Overview Tracking

  - [Using LLM integration for most Looker reports](https://fathom.video/share/XAEFkPMptVVtL83VwgCNbgs4okka4taY?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [Scrunch analysis tool provides aggregate data on AI citations, including average positioning, competitor comparisons, and opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/XAEFkPMptVVtL83VwgCNbgs4okka4taY?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [Data likely pulled from GA4, but needs verification with data team](https://fathom.video/share/XAEFkPMptVVtL83VwgCNbgs4okka4taY?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)

### Vendor Page Strategy

  - [Exploring adding more vendor-related pages, potentially focused on pricing queries](https://fathom.video/share/XAEFkPMptVVtL83VwgCNbgs4okka4taY?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - ["Versus" pages getting cited more in AI overviews](https://fathom.video/share/XAEFkPMptVVtL83VwgCNbgs4okka4taY?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Current content format (direct answers, charts) performing well for AI citations](https://fathom.video/share/XAEFkPMptVVtL83VwgCNbgs4okka4taY?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [Potential to expand content on vendor overview page](https://fathom.video/share/XAEFkPMptVVtL83VwgCNbgs4okka4taY?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
